articles.title: 2026 National League MVP Race According to Kalshi: Shohei Ohtani’s Award to Lose
articles.summary: Kalshi's 2026 National League MVP odds show Shohei Ohtani as the overwhelming favorite, suggesting the two-way superstar's dominance will continue well into his Dodgers contract. Early MVP futures often reveal where smart money sees value before the public catches on, making these lines worth tracking for anyone betting baseball awards or player props.

articles.title: How late will Leavitt be to the next press briefing? Pred...
articles.summary: Someone's running a prediction market on when Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt will show up late to her next White House briefing. Political punctuality bets are pure gold for traders who follow administration patterns, since press secretary timing often signals internal chaos or strategic delays.

articles.title: Kalshi is aggressively advertising on TikTok, seemingly targeting young people while promising a “money hack”
articles.summary: Kalshi is flooding TikTok with ads that pitch prediction markets as a "money hack" to Gen Z users who probably think futures contracts are something you buy at Best Buy. The aggressive youth-focused marketing signals Kalshi wants to build the next generation of prediction market users before competitors can grab them, but regulators tend to get cranky when financial platforms target teenagers with get-rich-quick messaging.

articles.title: Texas Finally Takes Aim At Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Texas regulators are finally cracking down on prediction markets operating in the state. This could force major platforms to restrict Texas users or face legal battles, potentially setting a precedent for how other states handle the booming prediction market industry.

articles.title: Polymarket trader exploits UFC blunder, turns $676 into $67,000 in under a minute
articles.summary: A Polymarket trader capitalized on the UFC's accidental early announcement of fight results, parlaying $676 into $67,000 before the market could correct itself. The incident highlights how information asymmetries can create massive arbitrage opportunities in prediction markets, though it also raises questions about whether such wins constitute legitimate trading or exploitation of technical errors.

articles.title: Lucrative bets that anticipated Trump's policy surprises warrant scrutiny, experts say
articles.summary: Some bettors made suspiciously well-timed wagers on Trump policy moves before they were publicly announced, raising questions about potential insider trading in prediction markets. If regulators crack down on information asymmetries, it could fundamentally change how political betting markets operate and what edge strategies actually work.

articles.title: Duke vs UConn Predictions: Kalshi Odds and Markets
articles.summary: Duke faces UConn in what appears to be a high-profile matchup drawing significant action on Kalshi's prediction markets. The betting patterns and odds movement will reveal whether institutional money sees value that retail bettors are missing, making this a key test case for basketball market efficiency.

articles.title: Opinion: Congress can rein in out-of-control prediction markets
articles.summary: Someone's calling for congressional regulation to crack down on prediction markets they view as getting too wild or manipulative. Any serious regulatory push would reshape the entire industry, potentially killing offshore platforms' US access and forcing dramatic changes to how Americans bet on politics and current events.

articles.title: The failures of prediction markets are predictable
articles.summary: Prediction markets consistently stumble over the same obstacles: thin liquidity, manipulation attempts, regulatory uncertainty, and the eternal struggle between accuracy and popularity. These recurring failures reveal systematic weaknesses that smart bettors can exploit and market operators must finally address if they want to scale beyond niche curiosities.

articles.title: 'Informed' traders on Polymarket netted $143 million in 'anomalous' profit since 2024, researchers find
articles.summary: Researchers discovered that a group of "informed" traders on Polymarket made $143 million in profits this year through what they're calling "anomalous" trading patterns. This suggests either insider information is flowing through prediction markets or sophisticated traders have found exploitable inefficiencies that regular bettors are getting crushed by.

articles.title: Kalshi Secures License to Offer Margin Trading to Pros
articles.summary: Kalshi just got regulatory approval to let professional traders use borrowed money when betting on their prediction markets. This puts them on more equal footing with traditional financial exchanges and should bring in bigger players with deeper pockets who can move markets more efficiently.

articles.title: How Prediction Markets Scaled to USD 21B in Monthly Volume in 2026 | TRM Blog
articles.summary: Prediction markets hit $21B in monthly trading volume by 2026, representing massive mainstream adoption of what was once a niche corner of crypto. The scale means serious institutional money finally views prediction markets as legitimate financial instruments, not just gambling on whether Trump will tweet about hamburgers.
